name: M3 GOLF LAB
address: 1901 Curve Plaza Suite 2, Steamboat Springs, CO 80487
about: The M3 Golf Lab is a cutting-edge training studio focused on golf performance improvement. It combines technology, physical therapy, and coaching to offer a comprehensive approach to the game. The facility utilizes state-of-the-art equipment, including Trackman launch monitors and 3-D motion analysis, to provide data-driven feedback and personalized coaching programs. Memberships and single sessions are available, catering to golfers of all skill levels who are serious about improving their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive 360-degree approach focusing on motion, mechanics, and mindset
Access to premium Trackman 4 technology and 3-D motion analysis (K-Vest & Hackmotion)
Structured memberships offer a cost-effective way for dedicated practice
Collaboration between PGA coaching and physical therapy expertise

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site kitchen or food service mentioned
No bar service or alcohol policy mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor used for tracking ball flight and providing swing data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is not explicitly stated, but as a dedicated golf training facility, it is highly recommended to bring your own clubs for a personalized experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any restrictions on bringing outside food or drink, nor does it list any on-site food or beverage services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard simulator times are not detailed, but single sessions are booked by the hour (e.g., $75 for one hour, $50 for a second hour).

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly? Do you offer junior programs?
faq.answer: Yes, they have a specific 'Junior Golf' section with a membership option for 10 hours at $40/hour, indicating a focus on youth instruction.
